# Non-Refundable Items

The following items are not eligible for refunds: downloaded-digital-content, customized-products (e.g., engraving or printing), and opened food or hygiene-products. gift-cards are non-refundable and cannot be exchanged for cash.

[Source: refund_policy.md#non-refundable-items]
